items.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
items.title: Regulatory Surveillance Over Weight Loss Drug (GLP-1) Supply Chain
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Regulatory Surveillance Over Weight Loss Drug (GLP-1) Supply Chain Posted On: 24 MAR 2026 10:02AM by PIB Delhi In order to ensure ethical pharmaceutical practices in the supply chain of Weight Loss Drug (GLP-1), the Drugs Controller of India has intensified its regulatory surveillance against the drug’s unauthorized sale and promotion. With …
